zh.Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England: 英國肯特布頓 馬爾海貝
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Wotton於1430年出生在英國肯特布頓 馬爾海貝時，他的父親Lord Nicholas Wotton I58歲，母親Joanna Corbie55歲。他於1444年與Elizabeth De Bamburgh在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1481年4月9日在英國肯特享年51歲，埋葬在英國肯特布頓 馬爾海貝。

zh-hans.Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England: 英国肯特布頓 馬爾海貝
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Wotton于1430年出生在英国肯特布頓 馬爾海貝时，他的父亲Lord Nicholas Wotton I58岁，母亲Joanna Corbie55岁。他于1444年与Elizabeth De Bamburgh在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1481年4月9日在英国肯特享年51岁，埋葬在英国肯特布頓 馬爾海貝。

nameMeanings.name: Wotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wooten
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English wid(u), wudu ‘wood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Wootton in Northamptonshire or Oxfordshire, Wootton Bassett in Wiltshire, Wotton in Surrey, and Wotton under Edge in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Wotton was born in 1430, in Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England, his father, Lord Nicholas Wotton I, was 58 and his mother, Joanna Corbie, was 55. He married Elizabeth De Bamburgh in 1444, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 April 1481, in Kent, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Wotton est né en 1430, à Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Lord Nicholas Wotton I, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Joanna Corbie, avait 55 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth De Bamburgh en 1444, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1481, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Wotton 1430 in Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Nicholas Wotton I 58 und seine Mutter Joanna Corbie 55. Er hat 1444 in Lincolnshire, England Elizabeth De Bamburgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. April 1481 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Wotton è nato il nel 1430 nel Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England, il suo padre, Lord Nicholas Wotton I, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Joanna Corbie, aveva 55 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth De Bamburgh nel 1444, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 aprile 1481, nel Kent, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England.

ja.Boughton Malherbe, Kent, England: イギリスケントボウトン マルハーベ
ja.Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Wottonが1430年にイギリスケントボウトン マルハーベで生まれた時，父Lord Nicholas Wotton Iは58歳，母Joanna Corbieは55歳であった。1444年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでElizabeth De Bamburghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1481年4月9日にイギリスケントで51歳で死去し，イギリスケントボウトン マルハーベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Wotton(이)가 1430년 영국 켄트 부그h턴 말헤르브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Nicholas Wotton I(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Corbie(은)는 55세였다. 그는 1444년 영국 링코실르에서 Elizabeth De Bamburgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 4월 9일 영국 켄트에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 부그h턴 말헤르브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Wotton nasceu em 1430, em Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Nicholas Wotton I, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Corbie, tinha 55 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth De Bamburgh em 1444, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1481, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Wotton родился в 1430 г. в местности боугтон малхирб, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Nicholas Wotton I было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Corbie, 55. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth De Bamburgh в 1444 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 апреля 1481 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности боугтон малхирб, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas Wotton nació en 1430, en Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Nicholas Wotton I, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Joanna Corbie, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Elizabeth De Bamburgh en 1444, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de abril de 1481, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Boughton Malherbe, Kent, Inglaterra.
